_meta.notes: SUBs change weekly. ALWAYS verify the current offer at the application page before recommending. The values here are last-known-good public offers, not real-time. Elevated/Resy/NLL offers tracked separately in elevated-offers.json.

historical_high_sub.notes: Public 100K offer ran late 2024 through early 2025 multiple times.

cards.name: Sapphire Reserve

historical_high_sub.notes: Briefly bumped to 125K with $500 Chase Travel credit during 2025 product refresh.

credits.name: Annual travel credit
credits.trigger: auto-applies to first $300 in travel charges per cardmember year

credits.name: DoorDash DashPass
credits.notes: Only valuable if you'd otherwise pay for DoorDash.

credits.name: Sapphire Reserve dining credit
credits.notes: Geographically limited; many users don't realize value.

cards.lounge_access: Priority Pass Select + Chase Sapphire Lounge by The Club (where available)
cards.notes: Q3 2025 product refresh raised AF to $795 and added/restructured credits. Realized credit value depends heavily on whether you use OpenTable, Lyft, Apple ecosystem.

cards.name: Freedom Unlimited

current_public_sub.extra: +1.5% cashback for first year on up to $20K spend

perks: Earns Chase UR if held alongside CSP/CSR/Ink (de facto 1.5x UR)

earning.rotating_5pct: 5% on rotating Q categories up to $1500/Q

cards.name: Ink Business Preferred
cards.five_24_impact: Counts toward 5/24 to be APPROVED, but does NOT add to 5/24 (Chase business card)
cards.notes: The workhorse of the Chase Ink family. 90K UR for $8K spend = ~1530 first-year value at floor cpp.

cards.name: Ink Business Cash
perks: Earns full UR if paired with CSP/CSR/Ink Preferred
cards.notes: $700 SUB for $6K spend over 6 months, but earned in cashback that converts to UR if you hold a transferable card.

cards.name: Ink Business Unlimited
perks: Earns full UR if paired with transferable card

cards.name: Platinum

elevated_sub_available.notes: Watch elevated-offers.json. Personal Plat 175K-200K + statement credit offers appear several times per year.

credits.name: Hotel credit (FHR/THC)
credits.trigger: $200 prepaid hotels via Amex Travel, must be FHR/THC

credits.name: Streaming
credits.trigger: $20/month at Disney Bundle, ESPN+, Hulu, Peacock, NYT, WSJ

perks: Delta Sky Club (own ticket only as of 2023)
cards.lounge_access: Centurion + PP + Delta Sky Club (paid Delta ticket)
cards.notes: Realized credit value typically 30-70% of headline depending on user's lifestyle. Equinox + Saks + Dell are notoriously hard to use; Uber + streaming are nearly automatic. Always compute Y1 net at REALIZED credit value, not headline.

cards.name: Business Platinum

elevated_sub_available.notes: Business Plat elevated offers up to 250K MR + 50% point rebate are common.

earning.bonus_pay_over_time: 35% point rebate on flights via PayOverTime up to 1M points/yr

perks: 35% airline rebate on Pay With Points (huge for business class)
cards.lounge_access: Centurion + PP + Delta Sky Club (paid Delta ticket)
cards.notes: The 35% airline rebate is the killer feature: 1.54cpp effective floor on Plat-airline flights. Often the highest Y1 net of any card when MSR is met organically.

credits.name: Dining credit
credits.trigger: $10/month at GrubHub, Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, Five Guys, etc.

cards.name: Business Gold

earning.categories: Airfare, advertising, gas, restaurants, US software/cloud, US shipping

perks: Up to $20K bonus 4x in top 2 categories per month

cards.name: Venture X
perks: Priority Pass + Cap One Lounge + Plaza Premium (cardholder + 2 guests)
cards.lounge_access: Priority Pass + Cap One Lounge + Plaza Premium
cards.notes: $395 AF − $300 travel credit − $150 anniversary = $-55 effective AF. Often a permanent keeper card.

cards.name: Strata Elite
cards.notes: New 2025 product. Verify current offer + benefits at application.

cards.issuer: Wells Fargo (discontinued for new applications post-2026 Bilt 2.0 launch)
cards.name: Bilt Mastercard (1.0 / legacy)
perks: Only card that earned full points on rent without a fee (pre-2026)
Status match Hyatt + IHG via Bilt status
cards.notes: Pre-2026 product. Replaced by Bilt 2.0 family (Palladium / Obsidian / Blue) issued by Column N.A. Holding the legacy Bilt does NOT block Bilt 2.0 SUB eligibility (different issuer, different product family per the welcome bonus wording).

cards.name: Bilt Palladium

credits.name: Bilt Travel Hotel credits (semi-annual)
credits.trigger: minimum two-night stay via Bilt Travel
credits.notes: Two $200 credits per year; semi-annual reset

earning.housing_up_to_1x: 1x on housing, capped (vs old Bilt 1x uncapped)

perks: Mastercard World Legend benefits (purchase protection, extended warranty, price drop protection)
cards.sub_eligibility_wording: Welcome bonuses are available only to those who do not currently hold a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A., have not previously held a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A., and have not received a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A. welcome bonus in the past.
cards.notes: Top-tier Bilt 2.0. SUB eligibility is FAMILY-WIDE across all 3 Bilt 2.0 cards (one SUB ever). Pick this tier if you have high spend AND want lounge + status. Housing 'up to 1X' means capped — confirm cap details at application. Apply via TPG affiliate link for 5x non-housing for first 5 days bonus.

cards.name: Bilt Obsidian

credits.name: Bilt Travel Hotel credits (semi-annual)
credits.trigger: minimum two-night stay via Bilt Travel

perks: Mastercard World Elite everyday benefits (trip delay, extended warranty)
transfer_partners: same as Palladium — Bilt 2.0 transfer partners
cards.sub_eligibility_wording: Welcome bonuses are available only to those who do not currently hold a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A., have not previously held a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A., and have not received a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A. welcome bonus in the past.
cards.notes: Mid-tier. Best value if you want category multipliers (3x dining or 3x grocery user-choice) without the Palladium AF. Family-wide SUB lockout — only get this if you don't want Palladium SUB.

cards.name: Bilt Blue
cards.sub_eligibility_wording: Welcome bonuses are available only to those who do not currently hold a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A., have not previously held a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A., and have not received a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A. welcome bonus in the past.
cards.notes: Free-AF entry into Bilt 2.0 ecosystem. Use if you want rent-to-points access without paying AF, OR as a fallback if Palladium/Obsidian don't justify AF for your spend. Family-wide SUB lockout applies — taking the $100 here means giving up the larger Palladium/Obsidian SUBs forever.

cards.name: Smartly Visa
cards.notes: Replaces the Altitude Reserve role partially. 4% on EVERYTHING with a $100K relationship is the highest no-cap flat rate available — but the relationship cost is high (opportunity cost on the deposits).

cards.name: Premium Rewards Elite
perks: With Plat Honors: 2.625% on everything, 3.5% on travel/dining
cards.notes: Only interesting if you have $100K+ at BoA/Merrill for Platinum Honors tier. Without it, mediocre.
